data.content: Plan capsule: implement `/beats?view=overview` as a non-draggable state overview of all visible beats. Touch likely files: `src/lib/beats-view.ts`, `src/components/app-header-hooks.ts`, `src/components/app-header-parts.tsx`, `src/app/beats/page.tsx`, plus new `src/components/beat-state-overview.tsx` and optional pure helper/test. Preserve existing views and detail lightbox behavior. Validate with bun install, lint, tsc, test, build, and manual `/beats?view=overview` check.
